system_description: Computerized provider order entry (CPOE) module at Bellbrook Regional Health (6,000-staff hospital system, 4 facilities). Processes PHI: medication and lab orders, results, and clinical alerts. Order delays directly affect patient care. The hospital is aligning the system to 800-53 ahead of a federal health-agency data exchange.

information_types.name: Clinical Orders and Results
information_types.description: PHI: medication orders, lab orders and results, clinical alerts
information_types.a_as_submitted_rationale: paper-order manual workaround exists (submitted A: LOW — see clinical availability floor)

floor_note: house convention: clinical availability floor — patient-safety-relevant information types force availability >= MODERATE; FIPS 199 high-water mark otherwise; SP 800-60 Vol II provisional impact levels are the type-level lookup source
